description:
Designed for brands seeking a stylish and practical cosmetic storage solution, this orange neoprene makeup bag combines vibrant color blocking with reliable functionality. The warm orange exterior is complemented by elegant vertical stripes, creating a modern appearance that stands out in retail collections and promotional campaigns.

Manufactured from high-quality neoprene, the bag offers excellent flexibility, cushioning, and splash resistance to help protect cosmetics, skincare products, travel toiletries, and personal accessories. Its lightweight construction makes it easy to pack inside luggage, handbags, backpacks, or beach totes without adding unnecessary weight.

The spacious interior provides efficient organization for makeup brushes, foundation bottles, sunscreen, lipsticks, charging cables, or other daily essentials. A premium zipper ensures smooth opening and secure closure, while reinforced stitching improves long-term durability for everyday use.

As a professional OEM & ODM manufacturer, Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides complete customization services including logo printing, color matching, dimensions, zipper accessories, packaging design, and private label production. This cosmetic bag is an ideal choice for beauty brands, promotional gifts, travel companies, retailers, and wholesale distributors worldwide.
